mainEntity.name: What are the costs of AEO services for attorneys in Los Angeles?
mainEntity.text: What are the costs of AEO services for attorneys in Los Angeles?

acceptedAnswer.text: AEO costs for Los Angeles attorneys range from $2,000-$10,000 monthly, depending on firm size, competition, and scope including audits, content, and schema; custom quotes recommended after free consultations.[1]

suggestedAnswer.text: Monthly retainers for LA law firm AEO typically start at $2,000 for basics like schema and audits, scaling to $10,000+ for full GEO integration and authority building. High competition drives prices up; request ROI projections. Insurance firms monitor top AEO users, potentially adjusting settlement tactics against visible firms.[3]

name: AEO Service Costs for Los Angeles Attorneys
